problem_text_cn: 两个初始温度T₁、T₂(T₂<T₁)的大物体，热容量均为C。1. 可逆卡诺热机在两物体间工作，求对外作功总量的极限；2. 热机工质ν mol，第一次循环：等压吸热L后全变为气相（体积V₁），等温膨胀至V₂，再经绝热等过程返回初态，画p-V和T-S曲线，计算作功大小。
problem_text_en: Two large objects with initial temperatures T₁、T₂(T₂<T₁)，both have heat capacity C。1. A reversible Carnot heat engine works between the two objects，find the limit of the total work done externally；2. The working substance of the heat engine is ν moles，first cycle：absorb heat L at constant pressure and completely turn into gas phase（volume V₁），isothermal expansion to V₂，then return to the initial state through adiabatic and other processes，draw p-V and T-S curves，and calculate the work done。
problem_solution_cn: （1）最大对外作功：- 终态温度Tₑ=√(T₁T₂)，功W=C(T₁+T₂-2√(T₁T₂))=C(√T₁-√T₂)²。（2）p-V和T-S曲线及作功：- p-V曲线：等压相变（A→B）→等温膨胀（B→C）→绝热过程（C→D）→等压/等温相变（D→A）；- T-S曲线：等温吸热（A→B，S增大）→绝热降温（B→C，S不变）→等温放热（C→D，S减小）→绝热升温（D→A，S不变）；- 作功W₁=(1-T₂/T₁)(L + νRT₁ln(V₂/V₁))。
problem_solution_en: （1）Maximum work done externally：- Final temperature Tₑ=√(T₁T₂)，work W=C(T₁+T₂-2√(T₁T₂))=C(√T₁-√T₂)²。（2）p-V and T-S curves and work done：- p-V curve：isobaric phase transition（A→B）→isothermal expansion（B→C）→adiabatic process（C→D）→isobaric/isothermal phase transition（D→A）；- T-S curve：isothermal heat absorption（A→B，S increases）→adiabatic cooling（B→C，S constant）→isothermal heat release（C→D，S decreases）→adiabatic heating（D→A，S constant）；- Work done W₁=(1-T₂/T₁)(L + νRT₁ln(V₂/V₁))。
